title: cylindropuntia acanthocarpa subsp. major
intro: Cylindropuntia acanthocarpa subsp. major, also known as the major chain fruit cholla, is a type of cactus that belongs to the Opuntia genus. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia acanthocarpa subsp. major include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the southwestern United States and Mexico.
